_comment: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=gateway is a sentinel value indicating the uf gateway proxy handles authentication. When the gateway is not running, OpenCode uses its own configured provider.
postStartCommand:
nohup opencode serve --port 4096 > /tmp/opencode-server.log 2>&1 & printf 'protocol=https
host=github.com

' | git credential fill 2>/dev/null | grep '^password=' | cut -d= -f2 | gh auth login --with-token 2>/dev/null || true
